headline: Here’s Why AppLovin (APP) Is One of the Best Long-Term Stocks to Buy Now for High Returns
summary: AppLovin Corporation (NASDAQ:APP) is one of the Best Long-Term Stocks to Buy Now for High Returns. On May 12, Needham analyst Bernie McTernan maintained a “Buy” rating on the company’s stock, setting the price objective of $700.00. The analyst’s rating comes off the back of factors associated with AppLovin Corporation (NASDAQ:APP)’s product roadmap and growth opportunities. The […]
